item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p04","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response immediately brakes the fourth manual-gate request, names the pattern as repeated downstream human patching, references the prior复看岗/拦截岗/抽检班 plus the requested确认人, and moves upstream to recurring release, identification, data/field, and responsibility failures. It permits a one-day emergency confirmer, but explicitly blocks making it a standing gate and requires structural repair plus removal of temporary posts, so the fail signal of simply adding another manual checkpoint is not observed."}
